summarization.a: The image depicts a molecular structure diagram illustrating the arrangement of atoms in a molecule.
summarization.b: The image depicts a molecular structure diagram illustrating the arrangement of atoms in a molecule, where HCl is desorbed.

b.question: What interactions are visible?
b.answer: b	The interaction of HCl with the newly formed OH bond as well as the OH bond from the SiO2 substrate.

b.question: Why are usually not actual substrates used in simulations?
b.answer: b	This is usually not done as this would require way more computing power as all chemical bonds in a substrate can have an influence on the reacting substrate.

a.question: Is the reaction shown similar to what would happen on a silicon wafer?
a.answer: a	The reaction is similar, but it is likely that it will be more complex as there are also backbonds of the substrate with reacting surface groups.
